title: cytisus infestus
intro: Cytisus infestus, also known as broom, is a shrub-like plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Cytisus infestus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Cytisus infestus include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
